scripts.test:browser:release-gate: playwright test -c v2/fui-rs/playwright.config.ts --project=chromium --grep 'shows the styled loading overlay before throttled bridge scripts arrive|generated routed-demo host services and host events flow into the Rust home route|runs routed-demo workers through the browser worker bridge and generated worker host services|routes to the stage 5 dropdown page and selects through keyboard interaction'
scripts.build: npm run lint:v2 && npm --workspace v2/fui-rs run typecheck && npm --workspace v2/fui-rs run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint:v2 && npm run typecheck
